name: Backswings Golf & Grill
about: Backswings Golf & Grill is a golf simulator venue that combines state-of-the-art technology with a full-service restaurant and bar. The facility features four bays equipped with Trackman golf simulators, providing an immersive experience for honing skills or enjoying a round with friends. The venue is designed to cater to a diverse clientele, from casual players to serious golfers, with an atmosphere focused on food, family, and fun. Their gourmet menu offers a selection of dishes made from fine ingredients, and they provide extensive drink options including craft beers, fine wines, and signature cocktails, allowing patrons to enjoy a complete dining experience alongside their golf activities.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman golf simulators offering immersive play and skill improvement
Full-service restaurant with gourmet food and extensive drink menu available right in the bays
Family-friendly atmosphere with activities for all ages, making it a great destination for groups
Availability of leagues and competitions for both casual and serious players

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant with gourmet menu including burgers, salads, fries, and desserts
Full bar with craft beers, fine wines, and signature cocktails

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether you need to bring your own clubs or if they are available for rental. It is recommended to call ahead or check their booking policy for details.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Backswings has a full-service restaurant and bar with its own menu and drink selection. They do not mention a policy on outside food or drinks, so it is best to assume they prefer you use their facilities.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for an 18-hole round. However, with four simulator bays and interactive games available, it is likely that rounds can be completed at a pace comfortable for the players.

faq.question: Is Backswings kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Backswings is explicitly described as family-friendly, with an atmosphere and activities catering to all ages. They mention it is a great place for teaching kids how to swing and for family bonding.
